allow: Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\)\); console.log\(icons.length ? icons : 'No Instagram icon found'\); const social = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => /social|twitter|facebook|github|link|globe/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0, 10\); console.log\('Similar:', social\);")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3199 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false } ; "killed" } else { "none" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,re,html; t=sys.stdin.read\(\); t=re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>','',t,flags=re.S\); t=re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>','',t,flags=re.S\); t=re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>',' ',t\); words=html.unescape\(t\).split\(\); print\('TR visible words:',len\(words\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,re,html; t=sys.stdin.read\(\); t=re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>','',t,flags=re.S\); t=re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>','',t,flags=re.S\); t=re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>',' ',t\); words=html.unescape\(t\).split\(\); print\('EN visible words:',len\(words\)\)")

Bash(powershell -c 'Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {\($_.Path -like '\\''*node*'\\''\)} | Where-Object {$_.MainWindowTitle -eq '\\'''\\''} | Select-Object Id,ProcessName | Format-Table')

PowerShell(try { Resolve-DnsName google._domainkey.getbayes.me -Type TXT -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | ForEach-Object { \($_.Strings -join ''\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, \($_.Strings -join ''\).Length\)\) } } catch { 'DKIM \(google selector\): YOK' }; try { Resolve-DnsName _dmarc.getbayes.me -Type TXT -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | ForEach-Object { $_.Strings -join '' } } catch { 'DMARC: YOK' })

PowerShell(try { Resolve-DnsName default._domainkey.getbayes.me -Type TXT -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | ForEach-Object { \($_.Strings -join ''\).Substring\(0,60\) + '...' } } catch { 'default selector: cozumlenmiyor' })

PowerShell(try { Resolve-DnsName google._domainkey.getbayes.me -Type TXT -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | ForEach-Object { $s = $_.Strings -join ''; $s.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(70,$s.Length\)\) + '... \(len=' + $s.Length + '\)' } } catch { 'google selector: YOK' }; try { Resolve-DnsName default._domainkey.getbayes.me -Type TXT -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | ForEach-Object { $s = $_.Strings -join ''; 'default selector hala var: ' + $s.Substring\(0,40\) + '...' } } catch { 'default selector: silinmis' })
